title: MetaComp, a Singapore-based regulated stablecoin cross-border payment firm, announced the completion of its Pre-A+ funding round, bringing its cumulative Pre-A funding to $35 million within three months
message_html: MetaComp, a Singapore-based regulated stablecoin cross-border payment firm, announced the completion of its Pre-A+ funding round, bringing its cumulative Pre-A funding to $35 million within three months ...
snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): MetaComp, a Singapore-based regulated stablecoin cross-border payment firm, announced the completion of its Pre-A+ funding round, bringing its cumulative Pre-A funding to $35 million within three months. This round was backed by Alibaba, Spark Venture, and existing sha
